text.title: LLM Observability Stack — Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules every application of `llm-observability-stack` must enforce. Verifiable at review time; failures gate the artifact.

rule.statement: Use OTel-native instrumentation (openllmetry / openinference) as the wire format; vendors are downstream consumers.
rule.rationale: Vendor-specific SDKs lock you in; OTel native lets you swap viewers.

rule.statement: Pin every stack component version (langfuse@3.x, otel-collector@0.95, prom@2.5).
rule.rationale: Floating versions cause silent breakage on upgrades.

rule.statement: Redact PII at the OTel collector with the attribute processor, not in app code only.
rule.rationale: Collector-side redaction is auditable and survives app-code regressions.

rule.statement: Price book lives in version-controlled pricing.yaml; updated on every provider price change.
rule.rationale: Inline prices in code drift; central yaml is one place to fix.

rule.statement: Alert tiers: page (cost 5x / quality 10pp / p95 5x), warn (cost 2x / quality 5pp / p95 2x).
rule.rationale: Single-tier alerts either spam or miss; tiered alerts match severity to response.

rule.statement: When EU customer data flows, observability stack is self-hosted in an EU region with documented data-residency.
rule.rationale: Cross-region trace storage may breach GDPR.
